title: MCNukes
description: A simple Forge mod that adds Nukes to Minecraft
body:
A simple mod that aims to add nuclear bombs with mushroom clouds and radiation to Forge. The mod aims to add things in the most accurate, but balanced ways, so that you can _become death the destroyer of worlds_ in your Survival servers!

If you want to support the mod, dropping a sub at [RyDaCol on YouTube](https://youtube.com/@RyDaCol?sub_confirmation=1) would help out a ton

**Why Should You Get This❓**

I would recommend this mod, if you simply want to add some weapons of mass destruction to destroy your friend's 100 day hardcore SMP's mansion or if you just purely want to play around with the mushroom clouds, nukes, uranium or plutonium.

**Contacting about any Bugs / Suggestions🔧**

I would love to learn about any bugs or suggestions for new features, that you guys may have!
_Just don't ask for me to port it to different versions._
Please contact me at: [Discord](https://discord.com/channels/980391020602736693/1325451207296421888)

**Consequences of Download / Potential Risk⚠️**

Well, the bombs explode :), and the radiation kills. Also, be careful with existing worlds, because I'm unsure if the mod would potentially corrupt them! Please backup any existing worlds, if you want to use this mod on them!

**What It Adds🧪**

- Nuclear Bomb (Gadget)
- Uranium (+variations)
- Plutonium Scraps
- Plutonium Core
- Mushroom Clouds
- Advancements
- Nuke Remotes (separate for different nukes)
- Neptunium Clumps
- Nuclear Bomb (Little Boy)
- Radiation

Pixilart Album🖼️ [https://www.pixilart.com/rydacolyt/albums/mcnukes-387728](https://www.pixilart.com/rydacolyt/albums/mcnukes-387728)
